title: How MPB Health Works
subtitle: Follow the steps to see how community medical cost sharing operates.

steps.title: Join MPB Health
steps.body: Choose the MPB Health membership that fits your family's needs and budget. Our advisors guide you through the simple enrollment process.

steps.title: Learn the Guidelines
steps.body: Understand our member guidelines and know which medical expenses are eligible for sharing. Our team is always available to answer questions.

steps.title: Contribute Monthly
steps.body: Make your monthly share contribution to the community. Select your IUA level to balance monthly costs with out-of-pocket responsibility.

steps.title: Share Medical Costs
steps.body: When you have an eligible medical need, submit your sharing request through our secure member portal. The community shares the cost.

steps.title: Thrive With Support
steps.body: Live confidently with ongoing advisor support, virtual care access, wellness resources, and a community that has your back.
